beads_created.title: Projection spine: cursor + idempotent apply contract
Projection lag metrics and backlog gauges
Deterministic projection rebuild tool (blue/green swap)
Fallback policy: HTTP fallback budgets + circuit breaker
Replay certification: rebuild -> digest equality suite
Audit spine: append-only audit log schema + writer API
Audit rules by mutation_class (policy enforcement)
Field-level diff auditing for mutable_with_audit
Actor identity propagation into audit + envelope
Audit completeness oracle: mutation -> exactly one audit record
Tenant registry + provisioning schema baseline
Tenant provisioning CLI (create/activate/verify)
Multi-tenant migration runner (N tenants, deterministic)
Tenant suspension/deprovision flow (safe + auditable)
Scale simulation: 100 tenants billing digest stability
Release pipeline: promote artifacts across environments
Secrets and config hardening (env contract + validation)
Service-to-service auth (signed internal requests)
RBAC for operator actions (tenant lifecycle + rebuild)
Dashboards: SLO views for lag, UNKNOWN, audit failures
DR drill: restore + replay rebuild + oracle pass
Rate limiting and overload protection for read paths
Compliance export: audit + ledger extract per tenant
